summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LMG talent management website. All core functionality working perfectly including backend APIs, frontend UI, navigation, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loading with LMG branding and logo
Navigation functionality (About, Services, Sports Management, Why LMG, Contact)
All sections present (Hero, About, Services, Sports, Why LMG, Contact)
Contact form field validation and submission
Success message display after form submission
Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu
